mapper.insert: INSERT INTO youtube_comment_analysis_histories ( user_id, video_url, original_file_path, original_saved_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{videoUrl}, #{originalFilePath}, #{originalSavedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, video_url, original_file_path, original_saved_at, preprocessed_file_path, preprocessed_saved_at, created_at, updated_at FROM youtube_comment_analysis_histories WHERE (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, user_id, video_url, original_file_path, original_saved_at, preprocessed_file_path, preprocessed_saved_at, created_at, updated_at FROM youtube_comment_analysis_histories WHERE id = #{id} AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) LIMIT 1
